drills.name: Wall Lean Shooting Drill
drills.instructions: Stand 30 cm from a wall. Drive your kicking knee up without your back touching the wall. 3 × 15 reps each leg. Then take 20 shots focusing on the same body position.
drills.coach_tip: At contact, your chest should be over the ball. Think: chin down, chest forward.
drills.progression: Take shots from different angles — always check your lean on replay.

drills.name: Corner Placement Drill
drills.instructions: Place cones in each corner of the goal (1 m from post and bar). Strike 30 shots — aim for each corner 7–8 times. Count hits.
drills.coach_tip: Inside foot for placement — strike through the side of the ball.
drills.progression: Add a goalkeeper. Shoot after receiving a pass — first time.

drills.name: Laces Power Drive
drills.instructions: From 20 m, strike 15 shots with full laces contact. Focus on a complete follow-through, foot pointed toward goal after contact.
drills.coach_tip: Lock your ankle, strike through the middle of the ball, and finish with your kicking foot pointing at the target.
drills.progression: Increase distance to 25 m. Use a tee for consistency.
